{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191853A214B536CFD671FBBAC2"}"},"total":821},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7453860514231452441","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"女主强大到无敌，副本世界当中救人也救己，一切都是最好的闭环，最后回到最初，救回了自己相救的家人，自己的“女儿”也能和她一起生活，弥补了大多数遗憾，算是很完美的结局了。徐娇娇的哥哥以及阳光开朗的赵天经历了许多之后也变成了和开始完全不一样的样子，也是令人唏嘘，作者笔下的很多角色都有血有肉，虽然经历着不好的事情，但是也在自己能力范围内努力的做一个“救世主”，没有抛弃人的良知，好看，意满离[送心]","text_exts":[{"e":175,"s":172,"text":"救世主","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417833371FBBAC2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227453860514231452441%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227377010324488064025%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E4%B8%96%E4%B8%BB%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735495553,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗨嗨嗨","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxOMJeATdlJkSqgEASxvfKo=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fd56ccc7c269455592ce9b169864cd54~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709251&x-signature=oEAMnn8GHToLfY9559qXg9bHBr4%3D","user_id":"967984084689165","user_name":"炎炎沐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"967984084689165","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1695229619,"is_worn":true,"stic   苏棉意外绑定求生游戏，只要攒够积分，就能回到现实世界。
为了早日完成任务，她义无反顾投身一个又一个危险世界。
 很快她发现游戏玩家不止她一个，似乎只有她不太一样……
第一个世界：海上求生（完成）
第二个世界：极寒世界（完成）
第三个世界：异形世界（完成）
第四个世界：变异世界（完成）
第五个世界：极热世界  (完成)

at":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":18226},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1726421377,"author_reply_time":1722327537,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7489402994835866393","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"🤧我一开始还以为解决主世界的丧尸问题，后面还能没有生命威胁去帮其它世界，补上徐川那个也行。没想到直接统子脱离了……赵天也面目全非……我看见又提示虽然任务有救人得积分的，但是有些人只能去掠夺，就大事不妙了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1743768516,"group_id":"7377010324488064025","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"838256177457603"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7377010324488064025","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"298"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读14小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":50015,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7489409999757067033","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看，很喜欢女主的性格，很干脆，也不拖泥带水。😭没有番外吗？没有番外吗？玩家们都挺好的，没想到徐川和赵天是这样的结局，有种突然被强行中断的怅然所失。一直以为黑衣人是徐川……没想到是异形里面失踪的赵天。唉:-(","text_exts":[{"e":44,"s":41,"text":"都挺好","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177417833371FBBAC2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227489409999757067033%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227377010324488064025%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E6%8C%BA%E5%A5%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance
